title: Add OSCORE is_protected check, ctx lookup, and coap_oscore_unprotect_request to msg_inbox_post
description: If CONFIG_LICHEN_COAP_SERVER_OSCORE and request is OSCORE protected, lookup ctx by peer EUI64, unprotect to get original payload and code. Fail closed with UNAUTHORIZED or BAD_REQUEST. Update payload handling accordingly. See deaddrop_post pattern and coap_oscore.h.
